package rulecoverage

func NegativeTableDrivenTestsMixMultipleDomainsInOneCasesSlice() string {
    ruleID := "table_driven_tests_mix_multiple_domains_in_one_cases_slice"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Oversized case tables that mix unrelated behaviors into one monolithic test."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
